manuscript_title: Development and Component-Level Internal Testing of Audiologist-Guided AI for Audiogram Extraction, Audiological Rule Conformance, and Chinese Reporting
contents: Exact locked system-prompt texts used in the formal study evaluations.

prompts.title: Audiogram and tympanometry image-recognition skill
prompts.evaluation_role: Locked image-recognition skill used once per case in the 105-case internally held-out Stage 1 evaluation.

prompts.title: Structured audiological reasoning and Chinese reporting skill
prompts.evaluation_role: Final structured-input calculation, professional-report, and patient-report skill used in the 95-case Stage 3 evaluation.
